options.name: -all
options.description: Deletes all integration constraints including those constraints understood by NR.

options.name: -customConstraints
options.description: Tells the command to delete all diffpair, match, complex shield and complex netclass constraints.

options.name: -name
options.description: This option allows the deletion of a specific constraint by name. The user can use the getIntegRouteConstraint command in order to get the name of any constraint in the design.

options.name: -net
options.description: Indicates the nets for which the constraints will be deleted. If the net part of a netClass, the netClass will be deleted as well.
